data.name: BasemapGalleryAutomationName
data.comment: UIA AutomationProperties.Name for the BasemapGallery control, used by screen readers to identify the control

data.name: BasemapGalleryAutomationHelpText
data.value: Displays a list of available basemaps. Select a basemap to use it for the current map or scene.
data.comment: UIA AutomationProperties.HelpText for the BasemapGallery control, providing context for accessibility tools

data.name: FeatureFormAddAttachmentMenuFromFile
data.comment: Menu text for adding a file attachment

data.name: FeatureFormAddAttachmentMenuWithCamera
data.comment: Menu text for adding an attachment by taking a photo

data.name: FeatureFormExceedsMaximumDateTime
data.value: Date must be on or before {0}
data.comment: Input validation of entered date must be before or on the maximum allowed date {0}

data.name: FeatureFormExceedsMaximumDateTimeNoRange
data.comment: Input validation of entered date Date exceeds maximum allowed

data.name: FeatureFormExceedsMaximumLength
data.comment: Input validation of entered text exceeds the maximum length of "{0}" characters

data.name: FeatureFormExceedsMaximumLengthNoRange
data.comment: Input validation of entered text exceeds the maximum length of characters

data.name: FeatureFormExceedsNumericMaximum
data.value: Enter a value at or below {0}
data.comment: Input validation of entered number is at or below the allowed maximum of {0}

data.name: FeatureFormExceedsNumericMaximumNoRange
data.comment: Input validation of entered number exceeds the maximum number allowed

data.name: FeatureFormExceedsNumericOutsideRange
data.comment: Input validation of entered number must be between the value {0} and {1}

data.name: FeatureFormFieldIsRequired
data.comment: Input validation: The field is required and a value must be entered

data.name: FeatureFormIncorrectValueType
data.value: Value must be of the correct type
data.comment: Input validation: The value entired is of an incorrect type (ie not a date, number etc)

data.name: FeatureFormIncorrectValueTypeFloatingPoint
data.comment: Input validation: The value entered isn't a number

data.name: FeatureFormIncorrectValueTypeNumeric
data.value: Value must be a whole number
data.comment: Input validation: The value entered must be a whole number

data.name: FeatureFormLessThanMinimumDateTime
data.value: Date must be on or after {0}
data.comment: Input validation of entered date most be on the {0} or later

data.name: FeatureFormLessThanMinimumDateTimeNoRange
data.comment: Input validation of entered date is before the required minimum

data.name: FeatureFormLessThanMinimumLength
data.comment: Input validation of entered text must be at least {0} characters long

data.name: FeatureFormLessThanNumericMinimum
data.comment: Input validation of entered number is below the minimum require value

data.name: FeatureFormNoAttachments
data.comment: The text displayed in the attachment list when there are no attachments.

data.name: FeatureFormNotInCodedValueDomain
data.value: Value must be within the domain
data.comment: Input validation of domain values is now any of the required domain values

data.name: FeatureFormNullNotAllowed
data.comment: Input validation of value was null or empty

data.name: FeatureFormOpenAttachmentMenuItem
data.comment: Menu text for opening a file attachment on the device

data.name: FeatureFormOutsideLengthRange
data.comment: Input validation of entered text must be of a length between {0} and {1} characters

data.name: FeatureFormRemoveAttachmentMenuItem
data.comment: The remove attachment context menu text

data.name: FeatureFormRenameAttachmentDialogCancel
data.comment: Cancel button for the Feature Form attachment rename-file dialog

data.name: FeatureFormRenameAttachmentDialogOK
data.comment: OK button for the Feature Form attachment rename-file dialog

data.name: FeatureFormRenameAttachmentMenuItem
data.comment: The rename attachment context menu text

data.name: FeatureFormRenameAttachmentWindowTitle
data.comment: The title of the dialog used for renaming feature file attachments

data.name: FeatureFormSpecificLength
data.comment: Input validation of entered text must be exactly {0} characters long

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsRemoveAssociation
data.comment: Button text for removing a utility association in FeatureFormView.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsShowOnMap
data.comment: Menu text for centering the associated feature on the map in FeatureFormView.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsMoreInformation
data.comment: Menu text for showing utility association details in FeatureFormView.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsPercentAlong
data.comment: Label for the fraction along edge slider in utility association details.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationSettings
data.comment: Title for the utility association settings/details in FeatureFormView.

data.name: FeatureFormDeleteAssociationConfirmationTitle
data.comment: Confirmation dialog title for the deleting the utility association.

data.name: FeatureFormDeleteAssociationConfirmationMessage
data.value: This will only remove the association. The feature remains.
data.comment: Confirmation dialog text for the deleting the utility association.

data.name: FeatureFormDeleteAssociationConfirmationAccept
data.comment: Text Label accepting utility association deletion.

data.name: FeatureFormDeleteAssociationConfirmationCancel
data.comment: Text Label cancelling utility association deletion.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsAddAssociation
data.comment: Button text for starting or completing the add association workflow in FeatureFormView.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsAssociationType
data.comment: Label for the association type shown on the add association review screen.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsAttachmentType
data.comment: Association type display name for an attachment association.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsCannotAddAssociation
data.comment: Error shown when the selected feature is not a valid candidate for the association.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsConnectivityType
data.comment: Association type display name for a connectivity association.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsContainmentType
data.comment: Association type display name for a containment association.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsContentVisibility
data.comment: Label for the containment visibility setting on the add association review screen.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsCurrentFeatureTerminal
data.comment: Label for the terminal selector of the feature being edited.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsFractionAlongEdgeError
data.comment: Error shown when the fraction along edge value is outside the allowed range.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsFractionAlongEdgePercent
data.comment: Label for the fraction along edge setting on the add association review screen.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsFromElement
data.comment: Label for the current feature on the add association review screen.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsNoCandidates
data.comment: Message shown when no candidate features are available for the selected source or asset type.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsNoFeatureSources
data.comment: Message shown when no network data sources can be used to create an association.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsNotEditable
data.value: Associations can't be edited for this feature.
data.comment: Message shown when the utility associations form element is read-only.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsOtherFeatureTerminal
data.comment: Label for the terminal selector of the feature being associated.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsReviewAssociation
data.comment: Title for the final add association review screen.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsSelectFeatureSource
data.comment: Description shown on the screen used to choose a network data source for a new association.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsSelectFromNetworkDataSource
data.comment: Action sheet option for browsing candidates from a network data source.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsSelectOnMap
data.comment: Action sheet option for selecting the associated feature from a map.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsSelectTerminalError
data.comment: Error shown when a required terminal selection is missing.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsStructureAttachmentType
data.comment: Association type display name for a structural attachment association.

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityAssociationsToElement
data.comment: Label for the selected associated feature on the add association review screen.

data.name: FloorFilterAllFacilities
data.comment: The label and tooltip shown for the button that is used to navigate to the list of location sites in all facilities when the site browsing view is open

data.name: FloorFilterAllFloors
data.comment: Tooltip on toggle button for togling all floors on and off

data.name: FloorFilterBackButton
data.comment: Tooltip on button for navigating back in the list of floors

data.name: FloorFilterBrowse
data.comment: The text and tooltip shown on the button that opens the browsing view

data.name: FloorFilterBrowseFacilities
data.comment: The text shown on the browsing view header for facilities

data.name: FloorFilterBrowseSites
data.comment: The text and tooltip shown on the browsing view header for sites

data.name: FloorFilterClose
data.comment: The text and tooltip shown for the button that is used to close the browsing view

data.name: FloorFilterCollapse
data.comment: Text on toggle button that collapses a list of floors

data.name: FloorFilterExpand
data.comment: Tooltip on toggle button that expands a list of floors

data.name: FloorFilterFilterSearchPlaceholder
data.comment: Placeholder text in filter search box

data.name: FloorFilterNoResultsFound
data.comment: Text displayed when a search didn't return any results.

data.name: FloorFilterZoomTo
data.comment: Text and Tooltip on button for zooming to a selected facility or site

data.name: PopupViewerViewHyperlinkText
data.comment: The text displayed for a hyperlink, that when clicked will view that webpage/link

data.name: PopupViewerUtilityAssociationsDefaultTitle
data.comment: The default title used when UtilityAssociationsPopupElement's title is empty

data.name: PopupViewerUtilityAssociationsNone
data.comment: The text used when all of UtilityAssociationsPopupElement's filters have no results

data.name: PopupViewerUtilityAssociationsShowAll
data.comment: The text used to expand a group in a UtilityAssociationsPopupElement's filter result

data.name: PopupViewerUtilityAssociationsTotal
data.comment: The text used to display the number of associations for a group in a UtilityAssociationsPopupElement's filter result

data.name: PopupViewerUtilityAssociationsVisibleContent
data.comment: The text used to indicate the associated feature is a visible content in a UtilityAssociationsPopupElement's group result

data.name: PopupViewerUtilityAssociationsNonVisibleContent
data.comment: The text used to indicate the associated feature is non-visible content in a UtilityAssociationsPopupElement's group result

data.name: PopupViewerUtilityAssociationsFilterByTitle
data.comment: The placeholder text to search associated features by title in a UtilityAssociationsPopupElement's group result

data.name: ScaleLineFeetAbbreviation
data.comment: Abbreviation of "Feet" displayed in the scale bar

data.name: ScaleLineKilometerAbbreviation
data.comment: Abbreviation of "Kilometers" displayed in the scale bar

data.name: ScaleLineMeterAbbreviation
data.comment: Abbreviation of "Meters" displayed in the scale bar

data.name: ScaleLineAutomationTypeName
data.comment: The type name of the ScaleLine control for accessibility uses

data.name: ScaleLineAutomationName
data.comment: UIA AutomationProperties.Name for the ScaleLine control, used by screen readers to identify the control

data.name: ScaleLineAutomationHelpText
data.value: Indicates the current scale for the map
data.comment: UIA AutomationProperties.HelpText for the ScaleLine control, providing context for accessibility tools

data.name: ScaleLineAutomationValue
data.comment: UIA ValueProperty.Value for the ScaleLine control, announces the map scale to screen readers

data.name: ScaleLineMilesAbbreviation
data.comment: Abbreviation of "Miles" displayed in the scale bar

data.name: SearchViewAllSourcesSelect
data.comment: The text to display for the button used to select all search sources.

data.name: SearchViewClearSearchTooltip
data.comment: The tooltip text to display for the clear/cancel search button.

data.name: SearchViewNoResults
data.comment: The message to show when a geocode search completes with no results

data.name: SearchViewRepeatSearch
data.comment: The text to display in the 'Repeat Search' button.

data.name: SearchViewSearchPlaceholderText
data.comment: The watermark/placeholder text to display in the location search textbox

data.name: SearchViewSearchTooltip
data.comment: The tooltip text to display for the search button.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolAddStartingPoint
data.comment: The text on button for adding starting points.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolAdvancedOptions
data.comment: The text for expanding advanced options to specify trace result name, color, and zoom to result behavior.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolAssetDetails
data.comment: The text for listing the asset information of the starting point.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolCancel
data.comment: The text on button to cancel adding starting points or running the trace.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolClearResults
data.comment: The text on button for discarding all trace results.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolClose
data.comment: The text on button for closing the starting point's information.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolDiscardResult
data.comment: The text on button that discards the selected trace result.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolDuplicateTrace
data.value: The selected trace type has already been run with the same starting points.
data.comment: The warning message when prior trace ran with the same trace type and starting points.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolFeatureResults
data.comment: The text for expanding feature result collection.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolFractionAlongEdge
data.comment: The text for updating the point location along the line.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolFunctionResults
data.comment: The text for expanding function result collection.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolIdentifyingStartingPoints
data.comment: The status message when tapping on features to add as starting points.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolInspectStartingPoint
data.comment: The text on button for displaying the current starting point's information.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolLoading
data.comment: The status message when loading contents of this control.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolMoreThanRequiredStartingPoints
data.value: There are more starting points than required for the selected trace type.
data.comment: The warning message when there are more starting points than the selected trace type requires.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolNewTrace
data.comment: The text for configuring a new trace.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolNext
data.comment: The text on button for navigating to the next starting point's information.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolNoFeatureResults
data.comment: The warning message when trace returned an empty feature result.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolNoFunctionResults
data.comment: The warning message when trace returned an empty function result.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolNoResults
data.comment: The warning message when trace returned an empty result.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolNotEnoughStartingPoints
data.value: The selected trace type requires additional starting points.
data.comment: The warning message when there are fewer starting points than the selected trace type requires.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolNoTraceTypes
data.value: No trace types found for the selected utility network.
data.comment: The error message when the selected utility network has no trace types.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolNoUtilityNetworks
data.comment: The error message when the map has no utility networks.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolPreview
data.comment: The text for previewing the graphic symbol when selected color is used.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolPrevious
data.comment: The text on button for navigating to the previous starting point's information.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolRemoveAllStartingPoints
data.comment: The text on button for removing all starting points.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolRemoveStartingPoint
data.comment: The text on button for removing the starting point.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolResultName
data.comment: The text for specifying a new result name.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolResults
data.comment: The text for listing the trace results.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolResultVisualizationColor
data.comment: The text for selecting a new result symbol color.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolRuningTrace
data.comment: The status message when there is a trace is in progress.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolRunTrace
data.comment: The text on button for running the trace.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolSelectFeatures
data.comment: The text to enable selection of feature results.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolShowGraphics
data.comment: The text to enable display of graphics with aggregated geometry results.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolStartingPoints
data.comment: The text for listing starting points.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolTapToIdentifyStartingPoints
data.value: Tap on the map to identify starting points.
data.comment: The instruction text for identifying starting points on the map.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolTerminal
data.comment: The text for selecting a terminal.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolTraceTypeCreator
data.comment: The text for displaying the creator of the selected trace type.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolTraceTypeDescription
data.comment: The text for displaying the description of the selected trace type.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolTraceTypeDetails
data.comment: The text for expanding information about the selected trace type.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolTraceTypes
data.comment: The text for listing trace types.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolTraceTypeTags
data.comment: The text for listing the tags for the selected trace type.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolUtilityNetworks
data.comment: The text for listing utility networks.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolVisualizationOptions
data.comment: The text for expanding symbol color palette.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolWarnings
data.comment: The text for expanding the list of trace result warnings.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolZoomStartingPoint
data.comment: The text on button that zooms around the starting point.

data.name: UtilityNetworkTraceToolZoomToResult
data.comment: The text on button that zooms to the selected trace result.

data.name: FeatureFormPendingEditsApply
data.comment: The text on the Apply button of the unsaved-edits warning dialog

data.name: FeatureFormPendingEditsCancel
data.comment: The text on the Cancel button of the unsaved-edits warning dialog

data.name: FeatureFormPendingEditsDiscard
data.comment: The text on the Discard button of the unsaved-edits warning dialog

data.name: FeatureFormApplyEditsErrorTitle
data.comment: The text on the dialog shown if saving edits to a feature form fails

data.name: FeatureFormPendingEditsMessage
data.value: You need to apply or discard edits of the current feature before moving to another feature. Do you want to apply the changes?
data.comment: The content of the dialog when user is warned about unsaved edits

data.name: FeatureFormPendingEditsTitle
data.comment: The title of the dialog when user is warned about unsaved edits

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityElementFractionAlongEdge
data.comment: The percentage fraction along an edge of a utility element association

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityElementIsContentVisible
data.comment: The text used to indicate the associated feature is a visible content in a UtilityAssociationsFormElement's group result

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityElementIsContentNotVisible
data.comment: The text used to indicate the associated feature is non-visible content in a UtilityAssociationsFormElement's group result

data.name: FeatureFormUtilityElementTerminalName
data.comment: The terminal name of utility element association

data.name: Locator_DefaultName
data.comment: Default display name for LocatorSearchSource if locator name is not set.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasAdd
data.comment: The text on the button that confirms adding a new on-demand offline map area.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasAddMapArea
data.comment: The text and accessibility label for the button that starts the on-demand offline map area workflow.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasAreaNamePlaceholder
data.comment: The placeholder text for the input where the user names an on-demand offline map area.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasCancel
data.comment: The text on the button that cancels adding a new on-demand offline map area.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasDownload
data.comment: The text and tooltip for the action that downloads an offline map area.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasDownloadSize
data.comment: The description shown for a downloaded on-demand offline map area. {0} is the localized file size.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasDefaultAreaTitle
data.comment: The default title for a new on-demand offline map area. {0} is a unique number.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasDownloaded
data.comment: The status label shown for an offline map area that has already been downloaded.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasNoInternetConnectionMessage
data.value: Could not retrieve map areas for this map
data.comment: The message shown when the toolkit cannot load offline map areas because internet access is unavailable.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasNoInternetConnectionTitle
data.comment: The title shown when the toolkit cannot load offline map areas because internet access is unavailable.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasNoMapAreasOnDemandMessage
data.value: There are no map areas for this map. Tap the button below to get started.
data.comment: The message shown when an on-demand offline-enabled map has no local map areas yet.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasNoMapAreasPreplannedMessage
data.value: There are no map areas for this map.
data.comment: The message shown when a preplanned offline-enabled map has no map areas available.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasNoMapAreasTitle
data.comment: The title shown when no offline map areas are available for the current map.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasOfflineDisabledMessage
data.value: The map is not enabled for offline use
data.comment: The message shown when the current map does not support offline use.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasOfflineDisabledTitle
data.comment: The title shown when the current map does not support offline use.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasOpen
data.comment: The text and accessibility label for the action that opens a downloaded offline map area.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasRefresh
data.comment: The text and accessibility label for the action that reloads offline map areas.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasRemove
data.comment: The text and tooltip for the action that removes a downloaded offline map area.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasSelectArea
data.comment: The heading shown above the map used to select the extent of a new on-demand offline map area.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleLabel
data.comment: The label shown above the drop-down used to select the cache scale for an on-demand offline map area.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleRoom
data.comment: Room (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleRooms
data.comment: Rooms (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleHouseProperty
data.comment: House Property (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleHouses
data.comment: Houses (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleSmallBuilding
data.comment: Small Building (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleBuilding
data.comment: Building (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleBuildings
data.comment: Buildings (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleStreet
data.comment: Street (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleStreets
data.comment: Streets (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleNeighborhood
data.comment: Neighborhood (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleTown
data.comment: Town (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleCity
data.comment: City (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleCities
data.comment: Cities (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleMetropolitanArea
data.comment: Metropolitan Area (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleCounty
data.comment: County (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleCounties
data.comment: Counties (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleStateProvince
data.comment: State/Province (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleStatesProvinces
data.comment: States/Provinces (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleCountriesSmall
data.comment: Countries (Small) (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleCountriesBig
data.comment: Countries (Big) (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleContinent
data.comment: Continent (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleWorldSmall
data.comment: World (Small) (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleWorldBig
data.comment: World (Big) (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasScaleWorld
data.comment: World (Level of Detail)

data.name: OfflineMapAreasStop
data.comment: The text and tooltip for the action that stops an in-progress offline map area download.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasBackgroundTaskTitle
data.comment: The title to display on a background task while taking maps offline.

data.name: OfflineMapAreasRemoveOnError
data.value: An error occured. Tap to remove.
data.comment: Accessibility text for error button
